description_long: This is a stylized humanoid female figure with an athletic build, featuring exaggeratedly long, thick hair that extends far behind her in a dramatic, flowing ponytail. She has a cyberpunk or futuristic appearance, with a sleeveless top, high-waisted pants, and gloves that reach above her elbows. Her left leg appears to be a prosthetic or robotic limb, adding to the sci-fi aesthetic. The figure's skin is a pale, almost grayish tone, and she has a confident, assertive stance with arms slightly bent and hands open. A badge or emblem is visible on her chest, suggesting some affiliation or role, possibly law enforcement or security. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on both style and functionality.
description: A futuristic female figure with a long ponytail, cybernetic leg, and sleek, form-fitting attire, exuding a confident and assertive presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's facial features, badge on the chest, and the full length of her arms and legs, including the robotic left leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme length and thickness of the ponytail, as well as the profile of her face and body.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the dramatic flow and volume of the ponytail, as well as the back details of her outfit and posture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail's extension and the side profile of her cybernetic leg and arm.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless top, high-waisted fitted pants, long gloves, and a visible badge or emblem
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent and hands open
attribute_hairstyle: extremely long, thick ponytail extending far behind
